name: PP-OCRv6
description: Extract text from images using PP-OCRv6 ONNX models — supports 50 languages with high accuracy, fully local.
systemPrompt: When the user shares an image, pastes a screenshot, or asks to extract text from an image, call the ocr_image tool — it shows a form for the user to provide the image file path. Do NOT try to guess the image path yourself. If PP-OCRv6 is not set up yet, call setup_ocr first to download models and configure languages.

setup-ocr.title: Set up OCR
setup-ocr.description: Download PP-OCRv6 models and configure OCR.
setup-ocr.prompt: Set up PP-OCRv6 for image text extraction

ocr-image.title: Extract text from image
ocr-image.description: Recognize text in an image using PP-OCRv6.

form.setup.title: Set up PP-OCRv6 OCR
form.setup.description: Select model tier and language. Models will be downloaded on first use.

form.setup.language.label: Language
toast.saved.title: OCR configuration saved
toast.saved.description: PP-OCRv6 models are ready. MCP Client will start the OCR service.
status.noModels: **No models cached.** Run `setup_ocr` to download models.
status.mcpUnavailable: **MCP Client:** not available (enable the MCP Client extension)
